VehicleComponentParams.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: Roberts Space Industries
Focus: Expedition

Ready to ferry a whole new generation of travelers across the universe, Roberts Space Industries is proud to introduce a starship eight centuries in the making - the all-new Zeus Mk II spacecraft. Paying homage to the classic design that launched Humanity to the stars in 2140, the Zeus Mk II has been updated to exceed modern standards while retaining the heart of this beloved spacefaring icon.  With a focus on exploration, the Zeus Mk II ES edition features a robust radar package for finding new discoveries, and enhanced weaponry and shielding to help bring them back home.
